name: dense jungle
hints: A dense jungle where most directions loop back on themselves. Only NORTH and WEST lead somewhere new.
Go NORTH to find a cave deeper in the jungle. Go WEST to return to the beach. DIG here with the shovel to find buried treasure.
DIG with the shovel to unearth buried items. NORTH leads to another jungle area with a cave entrance.
notes: Dense jungle - south and east loop back to this room. West returns to beach (room 7), north leads deeper into jungle (room 10) where a cave is located. Digging with the shovel reveals buried treasure.
